California Pastor: Hamas 'pimping' Palestinians as tools against Israel "Hamas is responsible for what’s going on in Israel right now," he added. "Hamas is pimping Palestinians to achieve its goal... Just as it has historically always hidden behind women and children" - The Jerusalem Post

‘Left Jerusalem out to dry’: Christian orgs. condemn US ceasefire abstain vote CUFI Action funder Chairwoman Sandra Parker asked, if the resolution was "Welcomed by Hamas," "Who is the current American policy helping?" - The Jerusalem Post

Over 140 global Christian leaders call for permanent ceasefire in Gaza The letter was delivered the day after the United States did not veto a UN vote calling for an immediate ceasefire in Gaza during Ramadan. The resolution passed with 14 votes in favor. - The Jerusalem Post

Pope leads Good Friday service ahead of Colosseum procession In previous years, Francis would start it prostrating himself on the marble floor of the basilica, but his physical condition no longer allows him to do so. - The Jerusalem Post

Facing more isolation, Israel loses international support for Its war on Hamas - analysis The longer the war goes on, the less legitimacy Israel has. "The current crisis between Israel and the US will affect other countries who will follow suit.” - The Jerusalem Post

REPORT Palestinians reject proposal to introduce Arab multi-national force in Gaza This recent proposal by leaders of the Arab World would see a multi-national force establish order in Gaza, with whispers that Arab leaders are interested in seeing a similar force in the West Bank. - The Jerusalem Post
